label.cloudflareTurnstileIntroduction: Cloudflare Turnstile is a privacy-friendly CAPTCHA alternative that automatically verifies users without showing disruptive puzzles.

notification.turnstileInvalidCredentials: The API credentials are invalid. Please check your Site Key and Secret Key.
notification.turnstileErrorInCredentialsValidation: An error occurred while validating the API credentials.

help.cloudflareTurnstileSiteKey: You can find the Site Key in your Cloudflare Dashboard under Turnstile.
help.cloudflareTurnstileSecretKey: You can find the Secret Key in your Cloudflare Dashboard under Turnstile.
help.cloudflareTurnstileWidgetMode: "Managed" lets Cloudflare decide whether user interaction is needed. "Non-interactive" always shows a widget without interaction. "Invisible" shows no visible widget.
